hero.headline: Stalking admissions threads shouldn't be a full-time job.
hero.subheadline: Waitlisteria tracks waitlist and offer activity across Reddit, Gradcafe, and Rednote — so you don't have to.

steps.oneDesc: Enter up to 10 programs you've applied to.
steps.twoDesc: Waitlisteria scans Reddit, Gradcafe, and Rednote for real applicant reports.
steps.threeDesc: Get structured data on offer rounds, waitlist movement, and admission probability.

card.sourceNote: 小红书 results are best-effort — Reddit and Gradcafe are more reliable sources.
card.disclaimer: Based on community reports — not official data
card.noData: No community reports found yet for this program.

notify.cta: Get notified when new offers are reported
notify.signInPrompt: Enter your email to get notified. We'll send a magic link.
notify.toggle: Notify me when offers or WL decisions are reported
notify.note: You'll only be notified on meaningful changes: new offer rounds, WL admits, or WL rejects. No spam.

fallback.banner: Live search unavailable — showing cached result from {date}. Donate to restore live search.

footer.withoutDonation: Without donations, results may be up to 24h old.
footer.free: This tool is free and always will be.

errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
errors.noSchools: Add at least one school to continue.

metadata.title: Waitlisteria — Admission Waitlist Tracker
metadata.description: Track graduate and undergraduate admission waitlists and offer trends in real time. Powered by AI.
